title: Assistant Store Manager - Malabar Gold & Diamonds - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Malabar Gold & Diamonds - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
